title: ‘A Dangerous Bluff’: Carney Likens Alberta Referendum to Brexit
summary_full: The Canadian prime minister, who was the governor of the Bank of England when Britain voted to leave the European Union, said the Alberta referendum on separating from Canada could backfire.
summary_public: The Canadian prime minister, who was the governor of the Bank of England when Britain voted to leave the European Union, said the Alberta referendum on separating from Canada could backfire.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: Carney Likens Alberta Referendum to Brexit
